title: VallbonAR
description: Final year Multiplatform Development (DAM) project developed in a team. I contributed to the mobile application and the augmented reality navigation system for indoor positioning in educational environments.
features: Augmented Reality Navigation with Unity AR foundation
API backend done in Typescript using Sanity CMS

title: Peer2Stream
description: Final year Web Development (DAW) project developed in a team. I focused mainly on frontend development and API integration using Next.js and Node.js.
features: Routing and API consumption with Node.js
Use of JWT tokens for the authentication

title: Laravel CRUD
description: Full stack CRUD application developed with Laravel. Focused on managing structured data with clean architecture and basic authentication.
features: Full CRUD system (create, read, update, delete)

title: Space-Survivors
description: My first step in game development in Unity. A top-down Vampire Survivors like game. I used free assets from Unity Store and Itch.io
features: Done with Android in mind, but it can be play on PC
